title: The Scarlet Letter
author: Nathaniel Hawthorne
content: “Be true! Be true! Be true! Show freely to the world, if not your worst, yet some trait whereby the worst may be inferred!”
action: Expose one hidden flaw in your current process.

title: Leaves of Grass
author: Walt Whitman
action: Eliminate one activity that drains your resolve.

title: The Road
author: Cormac McCarthy
content: “Keep a little fire burning; however small, however hidden.”
action: Protect your most vital, long-term project from distraction.

title: Invisible Man
author: Ralph Ellison
content: “I am invisible, understand, simply because people refuse to see me.”
action: Define your true objective against public perception.

title: The Sun Also Rises
author: Ernest Hemingway
content: “You can't get away from yourself by moving from one place to another.”
action: Face the internal problem you are avoiding.
